name: Leveling
description: Tracks per-server chat and voice XP with MEE6/Ree6-style cooldowns, level commands, leaderboards, level-up announcements, level role rewards, and automatic Economy LWD$ milestone rewards.
author: itsneufox
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs, display names, per-server chat XP, per-server voice XP, per-user level-up announcement preferences, configured level roles, ignored channel IDs, ignored role IDs, level-up channel IDs, and active voice session start timestamps. Administrators can disable tracking or adjust settings with `[p]levelset`.
